but yeah, the advantage of it over a conventional otk strategy is that if you fail to otk (deliberately, since you just had to spam cards now or lose next turn, or cause of rng whiffs) you still have a 50 retaliate caecus on the field
however, retaliate is a bit gimped in traphase since it doesn't trigger at all on the card they kill the character with (sanga heart celeste copy is the main offender 💀)
so you need to reserve a good amount of hp, which is easier said than done sometimes
